  • Deprecated Interfaces
    Interface
    Description
    org.eventb.core.sc.state.IVariantInfo
    This interface is no longer used
    org.rodinp.keyboard.ui.ISymbolsProvider
    This interface shall not be used. Use org.rodinp.keyboard.ui.core.ISymbolsProvider instead.
  • Deprecated Classes
    Class
    Description
    org.eventb.core.seqprover.xprover.XProverCall
    use XProverCall2 instead
    org.eventb.core.seqprover.xprover.XProverReasoner
    use XProverReasoner2 instead
    org.eventb.internal.core.sc.modules.MachineVariableFromParameterModule
    org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.ExE
    use the reasoner ExF instead since it generates a forward inference instead
    org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters.DisjToImplRewriter
    use DisjunctionToImplicationRewriter instead
    org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters.RemoveNegationRewriter
    use RemoveNegation instead
    org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters.TrivialRewriter
    use AutoRewrites instead
    org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters.TypePredRewriter
    this should be done in AutoRewrites
    org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.SimpleRewriter
    All SimpleRewrites in this class are deprecated since their functionality is redundant. Use AutoRewrites instead
    org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.SimpleRewriter.DisjToImpl
    org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.SimpleRewriter.RemoveNegation
    org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.SimpleRewriter.Trivial
    org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.SimpleRewriter.TypePred
    org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.AxiomPage
    use EditPage instead.
    org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.CarrierSetPage
    use EditPage instead.
    org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.ConstantPage
    use EditPage instead.
    org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.EventPage
    use EditPage instead.
    org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.InvariantPage
    use EditPage instead.
    org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.SyntheticViewPage
    use EditPage instead.
    org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.VariablePage
    use EditPage instead.
    org.eventb.internal.ui.OverlayIcon
    Use instead org.eclipse.jface.viewers.DecorationOverlayIcon
    org.rodinp.keyboard.ui.ExtensionSymbol
    This class shall not be used. Users shall use org.rodinp.keyboard.ui.core.ExtensionSymbol instead.
  • Deprecated Fields
    Field
    Description
    org.eventb.core.ast.Formula.KID
    This operator has become generic in version 2 of the mathematical language
    org.eventb.core.ast.Formula.KPRJ1
    This operator has become generic in version 2 of the mathematical language
    org.eventb.core.ast.Formula.KPRJ2
    This operator has become generic in version 2 of the mathematical language
    org.eventb.internal.core.sc.Messages.scuser_VariableIsParameterInAbstractMachine
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    org.eventb.core.ast.FormulaFactory.checkSymbol(String)
    use FormulaFactory.isValidExtensionSymbol(String) instead
    org.eventb.core.ast.IParseResult.isSuccess()
    Use !hasProblem() instead
    org.eventb.core.ast.ProblemKind.makeCompoundMessage(Collection<ASTProblem>)
    This method is no longer used.
    org.eventb.core.basis.EventBRoot.getFormulaFactory()
    org.eventb.core.IEventBRoot.getFormulaFactory()
    use IEventBRoot.getSafeFormulaFactory() and handle the exception
    org.eventb.core.pm.IProofComponent.getFormulaFactory()
    use IProofComponent.getSafeFormulaFactory() and handle the exception
    org.eventb.core.pm.IUserSupport.getFormulaFactory()
    use a formula factory from a proof
    org.eventb.core.pog.state.IMachineVariantInfo.getExpression()
    Use IMachineVariantInfo.getExpression(int)
    org.eventb.core.pog.state.IMachineVariantInfo.getVariant()
    Use IMachineVariantInfo.getVariant(int)
    org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.Tactics.dtDCInducGetPositions(Predicate)
    use either Tactics.dtDCGetPositions(Predicate) or Tactics.dtInducGetPositions(Predicate)
    org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.Tactics.dtInduction(Predicate, IPosition)
    use Tactics.dtInduction(IPosition)
    org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensionTests.AbstractManualReasonerTests.testGetPositions()
    use AbstractManualReasonerTests.assertGetPositions(String, String...) in a new test method
    org.eventb.core.seqprover.proofBuilder.ProofBuilder.rebuild(IProofTreeNode, IProofSkeleton, IProofMonitor)
    use ProofBuilder.rebuild(IProofTreeNode, IProofSkeleton, ReplayHints, boolean, IProofMonitor)
    org.eventb.core.seqprover.proofBuilder.ProofBuilder.rebuild(IProofTreeNode, IProofSkeleton, ReplayHints, IProofMonitor)
    use ProofBuilder.rebuild(IProofTreeNode, IProofSkeleton, ReplayHints, boolean, IProofMonitor)
    org.eventb.core.seqprover.ProverLib.isRuleReusable(IProofRule)
    Use ProverLib.isRuleReusable(IProofRule, Object) instead.
    org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasonerExtensionTests.AbstractReasonerTests.getSuccessfulReasonerApplications()
    Do not override this method anymore. Call AbstractReasonerTests.testSuccessfulReasonerApplications(String, SuccessfullReasonerApplication...) with your test cases instead.
    org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasonerExtensionTests.AbstractReasonerTests.getUnsuccessfullReasonerApplications()
    Do not override this method anymore. Call AbstractReasonerTests.testUnsuccessfulReasonerApplications(String, UnsuccessfullReasonerApplication...) with your test cases instead.
    org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasonerExtensionTests.AbstractReasonerTests.testReasonerFailure()
    Use AbstractReasonerTests.testUnsuccessfulReasonerApplications(String, UnsuccessfullReasonerApplication...) instead.
    org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasonerExtensionTests.AbstractReasonerTests.testReasonerSuccess()
    Use AbstractReasonerTests.testSuccessfulReasonerApplications(String, SuccessfullReasonerApplication...) instead.
    org.eventb.core.tests.pm.ProofComponentTests.formulaFactory()
    org.eventb.core.tests.pm.TestUserSupports.formulaFactoryCurrentProof()
    org.eventb.core.tests.pm.TestUserSupports.formulaFactoryNoCurrentProof()
    org.eventb.core.tests.tool.DummyConfigurationElement.getAttributeAsIs(String)
    org.eventb.core.tests.tool.DummyConfigurationElement.getNamespace()
    org.eventb.core.tests.tool.DummyConfigurationElement.getValueAsIs()
    org.eventb.internal.core.pm.ProofComponent.getFormulaFactory()
    org.eventb.internal.core.pm.UserSupport.getFormulaFactory()
    org.eventb.internal.core.pog.MachineVariantInfo.getExpression()
    org.eventb.internal.core.pog.MachineVariantInfo.getVariant()
    org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.EventBEditor.getFormulaFactory()
    org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.registry.tests.ConfigurationElementStub.getAttributeAsIs(String)
    org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.registry.tests.ConfigurationElementStub.getNamespace()
    org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.registry.tests.ConfigurationElementStub.getValueAsIs()
    org.eventb.ui.eventbeditor.IEventBEditor.getFormulaFactory()
    the underlying method is deprecated and this method was not actually needed by the UI; if the formula factory is needed at some point, it can typically be obtained through IEventBEditor.getRodinInput() and IEventBRoot.getSafeFormulaFactory()
    org.eventb.ui.EventBUIPlugin.getAxm_Default(FormulaFactory)
    use EventBUIPlugin.getAxm_Default()
    org.eventb.ui.EventBUIPlugin.getGrd_Default(FormulaFactory)
    use EventBUIPlugin.getGrd_Default()
    org.eventb.ui.EventBUIPlugin.getInv_Default(FormulaFactory)
    use EventBUIPlugin.getInv_Default()
    org.eventb.ui.EventBUIPlugin.getPrd_Default(FormulaFactory)
    use EventBUIPlugin.getPrd_Default()
    org.eventb.ui.EventBUIPlugin.getSub_Default(FormulaFactory)
    use EventBUIPlugin.getSub_Default()
    org.eventb.ui.EventBUIPlugin.getThm_Default(FormulaFactory)
    use EventBUIPlugin.getThm_Default()
    org.rodinp.core.emf.api.impl.ApiFactoryImpl.getPackage()
     
    org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore.impl.LightcoreFactoryImpl.getPackage()
     
    org.rodinp.core.IRodinFile.findElements(IRodinElement)
    This method has never been implemented and always returns an empty array.
    org.rodinp.internal.core.RodinFile.findElements(IRodinElement)
  • Deprecated Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    org.eventb.core.preferences.CachedPreferenceMap(IPrefElementTranslator<T>)
    use CachedPreferenceMap(IXMLPrefSerializer, IReferenceMaker) instead
  • Deprecated Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    org.eventb.core.ast.ProblemKind.VariousPossibleErrors
    this error kind is no longer used.
    org.eventb.core.sc.GraphProblem.VariableIsParameterInAbstractMachineError
